title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Kolte-Patil Developers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Kolte-Patil Developers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!
